entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop produced in Niger whose growth variability is a limiting factor for production

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: The country where the study on groundnut growth variability was conducted

entities.description: Variation in crop growth that acts as a limiting factor for groundnut production

entities.name: SCUTELLONEMA CLATHRICAUDATUM
entities.description: A widespread and abundant nematode associated with groundnut growth variability, chlorosis, and stunting

entities.description: A widespread nematode associated with groundnut growth variability

entities.description: A widespread nematode associated with groundnut growth variability

entities.description: A nematode associated with groundnut growth variability

entities.description: A nematode associated with groundnut growth variability

entities.description: A nematode associated with groundnut growth variability

entities.name: MACROPOSTHONIA CURVATA
entities.description: A nematode associated with groundnut growth variability

entities.name: PARALONGIDORUS BULLATUS
entities.description: A nematode associated with groundnut growth variability

entities.name: CHLOROSIS
entities.description: A condition of yellowing in poorly growing plants associated with S. clathricaudatum and high Al/H-ion concentrations

entities.name: STUNTING
entities.description: A condition of reduced growth in plants associated with S. clathricaudatum

entities.name: GROUNDNUT CV. 55-437
entities.description: A specific groundnut cultivar whose growth is reduced by S. clathricaudatum

entities.name: CARBOFURAN APPLICATION
entities.description: Soil application of carbofuran used to reduce nematode population densities and improve crop growth

entities.name: AL AND H-ION CONCENTRATIONS
entities.description: Soil chemical concentrations associated with poorly growing chlorotic seedlings

relationships.description: reduces variability by promoting uniform growth
